meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Founders: Solve 'No Project Ideas' with Strategic Onboarding
content.seo_description: Stop staring at a blank screen. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding flows that validate your SaaS ideas and secure early revenue fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no project idea' trap is a symptom of building in a vacuum. By implementing high-intent user onboarding, you force early interaction with real users. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to deploy modular, data-driven onboarding flows that capture pain points, transform anonymous visitors into leads, and validate your market hypothesis instantly.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the graveyard of ambition. You aren't lacking creativity; you're lacking a feedback loop. When you don't have a project, it's usually because you're trying to solve your own problems instead of solving a high-value headache for a specific, paying audience.

The real secret to shipping isn't a 'Eureka' moment; it's building an onboarding flow that acts as a diagnostic tool. Treat your onboarding as a product in itself—one that filters out tire-kickers and qualifies high-value customers before you've even finished writing the core backend logic.

steps.title: Define the Value-First Onboarding Hook
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment of your potential product. Instead of a generic signup, build an interactive assessment that solves one small piece of the user's problem immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS Architect. Create a schema for a 3-step user onboarding flow that collects industry, primary pain point, and current tech stack. Ensure it maps to a user profile object.

steps.title: Build the Logic Engine for Qualification
steps.description: Use logic branching to score users. If they have high-value pain points, route them to a premium upsell path; if they are low-intent, route them to a content nurture sequence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the conditional logic handler for user segmentation based on the onboarding inputs. Use a scoring algorithm that identifies high-intent B2B leads.

steps.title: Implement Frictionless Authentication
steps.description: Reduce drop-off by using Magic Links or Social Auth. Never force a password on day one when you are still validating the project's viability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate a passwordless authentication flow using Supabase or Clerk within the existing onboarding structure.

steps.title: Connect Data to a CRM for Lead Tracking
steps.description: Every onboarding input is a lead. Pipe this data automatically to a CRM so you can reach out manually to validate the project idea.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a webhook service that triggers on onboarding completion, sending the user profile data to a CRM API.

steps.title: Deploy the MVP Onboarding Shell
steps.description: Wrap the flow in a lightweight shell. This allows you to test the 'idea' by driving traffic to the onboarding page before the actual SaaS app is built.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Package the onboarding flow into a deployable Vercel project with optimized Lighthouse scores and SEO meta tags.

pro_tips: Never ask for more than three fields in your initial onboarding; every extra field reduces conversion by 15%.
Use 'Time to Value' as your North Star metric; if the user doesn't see a result in 60 seconds, they will churn.
Add a 'Why are you here?' open-ended text box at the end of onboarding—this is your primary source for future feature requests.
A/B test your onboarding CTA copy; 'Get Started' is weak, 'Solve My Workflow' is a conversion machine.
Track onboarding drop-off points with precision; if users stop at step 2, that's where your value proposition is failing.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, drive 100 targeted visitors to the page via LinkedIn or Twitter. If you get zero signups, your idea is invalid. If you get 5+ signups, you have a project worth building.
content.conversion_block: Stop guessing what the market wants and start building what they pay for. Our community of founders is shipping daily, validating ideas, and scaling revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
